prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年广西大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约44020名→48143名→56446名→83093名→84598名，整体呈持续后移趋势，尤其2024年较2023年大幅后移约26600名，2025年仅小幅后移约1500名，后移速度明显放缓，2025年基准位次约84598名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021年249人、2022年240人、2023年237人、2024年239人、2025年253人，2026年计划增至280人，较2025年扩招27人（+10.7%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争压力有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 广西大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021年第94名→2022年第99名→2023年第96名→2024年第90名→2025年第89名→2026年第86名，排名稳步提升反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第25（较热），综合热度约183万，在211高校中关注度处于中上水平，氧化菊返校走秀等校园活动获得较高曝光，对报考热度有正面推动作用；但该校在土木工程、电气工程、轻工技术与工程等领域具有传统优势，相关专业对考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续高热，广西大学开设的计算机类、电气类、电子信息类等专业与热门方向匹配，吸引高分考生报考；山东省2026年考生总数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约5.7%，竞争加剧；广西大学位于广西南宁，属于西南地区，在山东省属于跨省招生，无本地生源倾斜优势；该校在山东省招生人数占全国总招生比例约3%-4%，属于中等偏下水平，地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招（+10.7%）对位次的推后作用、山东省考生总数增加（+5.7%）带来的竞争加剧、以及学校排名上升和抖音热度较热带来的吸引力增强，考虑考生规模扩大和学校声誉提升的正面效应，适度前移修正；预测2026年最低录取位次约88514名，波动区间88014–89014名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Guangxi University in Shandong Province comprehensive category were approximately 44020 → 48143 → 56446 → 83093 → 84598, showing a continuous backward trend. Especially in 2024, it shifted backward by about 26600 places compared to 2023, while in 2025 it only shifted backward by about 1500 places, indicating a significant slowdown. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 84598. The enrollment plan in Shandong comprehensive category was 249 in 2021, 240 in 2022, 237 in 2023, 239 in 2024, 253 in 2025, and is planned to increase to 280 in 2026, an expansion of 27 students (+10.7%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guangxi University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising in recent years: 94th in 2021 → 99th in 2022 → 96th in 2023 → 90th in 2024 → 89th in 2025 → 86th in 2026. The steady improvement reflects the enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength, increasing its appeal to candidates. In recent years, its reputation has been stable, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 25th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.83 million, indicating above-average attention among 211 universities. Campus activities such as the Yanghuaju return fashion show have gained high exposure, positively boosting application enthusiasm. However, the university has traditional advantages in fields such as civil engineering, electrical engineering, and light industry technology and engineering, which attract candidates to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering and automation continue to be highly popular in society. Guangxi University offers majors in computer science, electrical engineering, electronic information, etc., which match popular directions and attract high-scoring candidates. The total number of candidates in Shandong Province in 2026 is about 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% compared to about 681,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Guangxi University is located in Nanning, Guangxi, in the southwest region, and recruits across provinces in Shandong, with no advantage of local student preference. The proportion of its enrollment in Shandong to the total national enrollment is about 3%-4%, which is at a medium-low level, and regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion in 2026 (+10.7%) pushing rankings further back, the increased competition due to the rise in the number of candidates in Shandong Province (+5.7%), and the enhanced attractiveness from the university's rising ranking and high Douyin popularity, a moderate forward adjustment is made to account for the positive effects of the expanded candidate pool and improved reputation. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 88514, with a fluctuation range of 88014–89014.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 88014–89014, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., below 88000), you can focus on reaching for popular Tier 1 majors such as Law and Electrical Engineering and Automation. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 89000), it is advisable to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also considering Tier 2 majors with high social popularity such as Accounting and Mathematics and Applied Mathematics.
